Small wedding back yard

September 5th 2026

Brenda daughter

100
outcome_autofill_reasoning: The call was a productive outbound conversation with Brenda (and briefly Steve), who are planning a backyard wedding for ~100 guests on September 5th, 2026. The prospect engaged fully, provided their email, asked detailed qualifying questions (allergies, setup time, menu options), and expressed clear interest. Andre guided them toward attending a tasting event on May 3rd at $35/person. However, no meeting or tasting was formally booked/paid for during the call — Brenda said she needs to figure out how many people will attend and will fill out the form afterward. The tasting registration was left as a next step pending action from Brenda. Since the prospect is clearly qualified and interested but no concrete booking was confirmed/completed during the call, this best fits "Qualified – Needs Next Step."

recording_transcript.summary_html:
• Discussed catering for daughter's backyard wedding on September 5th, 2026, with approximately 100 guests.
  • Reviewed Comeketo's Brazilian barbecue services, including allergy protocols and setup logistics.
  • Offered complimentary dessert table contingent on attending May 3rd tasting event at $35 per person with $70 credit applied toward final bill.
  • Sent tasting enrollment details, menu packages, and videos via email and text.
  • Confirmed follow-up contact and next steps for completing tasting registration.

Event Details and Inquiry

  • Brenda called on behalf of her daughter's small backyard wedding scheduled for September 5th, 2026, a Saturday.
  • The event will accommodate approximately 80-90 guests, estimated at 100 for pricing purposes.
  • Brenda and her husband Steve are planning the catering and found Comeketo Catering through Facebook.
  • Andre confirmed he has capacity for the date, as he currently has two other weddings scheduled.

Catering Services and Offerings

  • Comeketo offers Brazilian barbecue catering services with churrasco-style meats and sides.
  • The company takes allergies very seriously and will coordinate with event planners 45 days before the event to collect RSVPs and allergy information.
  • Menu items will include allergen labeling so guests can identify potential concerns.
  • Setup typically begins at 4:30 PM if dinner starts at 6:00 PM, with advance planning 45 days prior to confirm logistics, electrical needs, water access, and setup locations.

Tasting Event and Pricing

  • A complimentary dessert table is offered upon booking, contingent on attending a tasting event.
  • Comeketo is hosting a tasting on May 3rd at 5:30 PM (Sunday), where guests can sample approximately 30 different food items and observe service with carved meats.
  • The tasting costs $35 per person, with a $70 credit applied toward the catering bill once the couple confirms their booking.
  • Attendees can bring a party of any size (e.g., 6-10 people) to the tasting at the same per-person rate.

Next Steps and Communication

  • Andre sent text messages and emails containing tasting enrollment information, menu packages, and videos of past events.
  • Brenda and Steve need to enroll for the May 3rd tasting through an online form and payment link.
  • After payment is submitted, they should notify Andre to reserve their table.
  • Andre will send additional information via email and is available by text, email, or phone for any questions.
  • Brenda's email is bcatalano85@comcast.net and has been added to Andre's file for follow-up.

- Reviewed Comeketo's Brazilian barbecue services, including allergy protocols and setup logistics.
- Offered complimentary dessert table contingent on attending May 3rd tasting event at $35 per person with $70 credit applied toward final bill.

### Event Details and Inquiry
- Brenda called on behalf of her daughter's small backyard wedding scheduled for **September 5th, 2026**, a Saturday.
- The event will accommodate approximately **80-90 guests, estimated at 100** for pricing purposes.
- Brenda and her husband Steve are planning the catering and found Comeketo Catering through Facebook.
- Andre confirmed he has capacity for the date, as he currently has two other weddings scheduled.

### Catering Services and Offerings
- Comeketo offers Brazilian barbecue catering services with churrasco-style meats and sides.
- The company takes allergies very seriously and will coordinate with event planners 45 days before the event to collect RSVPs and allergy information.
- Menu items will include allergen labeling so guests can identify potential concerns.
- Setup typically begins at 4:30 PM if dinner starts at 6:00 PM, with advance planning 45 days prior to confirm logistics, electrical needs, water access, and setup locations.

### Tasting Event and Pricing
- A complimentary dessert table is offered upon booking, contingent on attending a tasting event.
- Comeketo is hosting a tasting on May 3rd at 5:30 PM (Sunday), where guests can sample approximately 30 different food items and observe service with carved meats.
- The tasting costs $35 per person, with a $70 credit applied toward the catering bill once the couple confirms their booking.
- Attendees can bring a party of any size (e.g., 6-10 people) to the tasting at the same per-person rate.

### Next Steps and Communication

- Brenda and Steve need to enroll for the May 3rd tasting through an online form and payment link.
- After payment is submitted, they should notify Andre to reserve their table.
- Andre will send additional information via email and is available by text, email, or phone for any questions.
- Brenda's email is **bcatalano85@comcast.net** and has been added to Andre's file for follow-up.
